message:
refactor(codex): convert .codex/rules to directory structure for v0.77.0+

Codex CLI v0.77.0 changed from file-based rules storage (.codex/rules as
a single file) to directory-based storage (.codex/rules/ as a directory
containing individual rule files like ubs.md, custom.md, etc.).

This commit restructures the UBS project's own .codex configuration to
follow the new convention:

  Before: .codex/rules (file, 51 lines)
  After:  .codex/rules/ubs.md (file inside directory)

The content remains identical - only the storage structure changed.
This serves as a reference example for users setting up Codex v0.77.0+
with UBS guardrails.

Note: The UBS installer (install.sh) already handles both formats via
the append_quick_reference_block() function which detects whether the
target is a file or directory and writes accordingly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
